Why we ask: The role supports both traditional ML and generative AI use cases, which require working across different data types.

ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. The 'Voluntary Self-Identification Survey' was truncated in the provided HTML, so only the first two questions are included.

fields.question: Resume/CV
Full name
Pronouns
Email
Phone
Current location
Current company
LinkedIn URL
Portfolio URL
Other website
How did you hear about us?
Are you legally eligible to work for any employer in the United States?
Would you require future sponsorship in order to work in the United States?

Have you personally designed and maintained a reusable "gold" dataset or feature layer used by multiple ML/AI projects—not just a one-off pipeline? Please briefly describe the dataset, who used it, and how it was maintained.
Tell us about a time you had to determine what data actually meant by reading SQL, stored procedures, source code, or interviewing subject matter experts. What was the outcome?
Have you built datasets specifically for ML, LLM, or GenAI use cases? Select all that apply:

Have you worked with both structured and unstructured data (e.g., text, PDFs, logs) to create AI/ML-ready datasets (e.g., feature engineering, labeling, or RAG datasets)? Why we ask: The role supports both traditional ML and generative AI use cases, which require working across different data types.
Which Databricks capabilities have you personally implemented in production?
Have you built pipelines that transformed unstructured data into AI-ready datasets?
Which of the following have you personally implemented for model-training datasets?
Gender Identity
Do you identify as a member of the LGBTQ+ Community?
